expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["I read everything — here's what I see"]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["You and Athina Mari are in Tanzania and Zanzibar from ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Aug 3–20, 2026"]},", with stops in Cairo on both ends. Your notes cover hotels (Eileen Hotel, Ramses Hilton, Serengeti Villa, the Suricata safari camps, and Zanzibar accommodation), a 3-day safari, and a spread of contacts including Richard from the safari office."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["The spreadsheet tracks costs across several categories, and the Ngorongoro PDF lays out the park-fee tariff structure — vehicle fees, per-person entry, and any concessions — in both dollars and shillings."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["From your voice memo: the crater day with guide ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Emmanuel"]}," was one of the best of your life. You bought ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["two beaded bracelets for Athina Mari"]}," from a Maasai lady at the rim — roughly TZS 35,000 (~$20–25) — and Emmanuel flagged a possible ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["extra ranger tip of ~TZS 5,000"]},"at the gate, separate from the park fees, that nobody had told you about. You want to ask Richard about that before settling the safari balance."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["And the Stone Town photo — warm sunlit courtyard, white stucco, dark wooden balconies, bright blue sky. A keeper."]},{"type":"Divider","props":{},"children":[]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Right now this is scattered across a notes file, a spreadsheet, a PDF, a photo, and a voice memo — and you said it yourself, you don't trust keeping it straight on your phone once you're there."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Want me to pull it all together into an app you can open on your phone?"]}," It would have: a trip dashboard with every stop and hotel, a running cost tracker from your spreadsheet, the Ngorongoro tariff reference, your memories and the Stone Town photo, and everything from the voice memo — the bracelet purchase, the ranger-tip question, and the Richard follow-up — so nothing gets dropped. One place, no digging through files."]}]}

args.query: Describe this photo in a SHORT paragraph — what it shows, the mood, any notable details. Keep it concise.
